name: Simple Vertical Layout
summary: VerticalLayout for simple single-page forms with a few fields
whenToUse: Simple forms with 1-5 fields and a single purpose
When a multi-page layout would add unnecessary complexity
notes: Use VerticalLayout as the root when the form is simple and single-purpose
Fields render top-to-bottom in the order listed in elements
Combine with `required` in the data schema to mark mandatory fields
